summary: M306 — Infinite Depths: post-game scaling dungeon unlocked after defeating an Act 5 boss. Procedural 3-5 node floors, HP×1.15^N / dmg×1.10^N scaling, 10 floor effects, anchor boss every 5 floors with guaranteed legendary drop. Local leaderboard, run state persisted, separate InfiniteDungeonScreen + /assets/infinite-dungeon.html catalog page.
